channel.title: NOVO — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on NOVO (Novo Nordisk) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Terry Smith: ADDED NOVO (+6%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Terry Smith (Fundsmith) added NOVO in Q2 2024 · 9.0% of portfolio. Novo Nordisk add.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Terry Smith)
